channel.title: tm - Technisches Messen
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in tm - Technisches Messen

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Jasmin Ruprecht, Mingshuai Su, Maximilian Hoffmann, Ingo Ortlepp DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/teme-2025-frontmatter1-2

item.title: Measurement and advanced data post-processing of proton resonance frequency shift in 7 T MRI to obtain local temperature in a tissue-mimicking phantom
item.description: Article by Jasmin Ruprecht, Mingshuai Su, Maximilian Hoffmann, Ingo Ortlepp DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/teme-2023-0167

item.title: Algorithmic assessment of drag on thermally cut sheet metal edges
item.description: Article by Jasmin Ruprecht, Mingshuai Su, Maximilian Hoffmann, Ingo Ortlepp DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/teme-2024-0090

item.title: Messunsicherheit geometrischer Prüfmerkmale – Automatisiert und praxisgerecht mit Koordinatenmessgeräten ermitteln
item.description: Article by Jasmin Ruprecht, Mingshuai Su, Maximilian Hoffmann, Ingo Ortlepp DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/teme-2024-0033

item.title: Measuring the frequency response of an optical microphone system with a fiber based setup
item.description: Article by Jasmin Ruprecht, Mingshuai Su, Maximilian Hoffmann, Ingo Ortlepp DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/teme-2024-0097

item.title: Spatial detection and localisation of multiple laser beams in optical measuring systems
item.description: Article by Jasmin Ruprecht, Mingshuai Su, Maximilian Hoffmann, Ingo Ortlepp DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/teme-2024-0103
